allow: PowerShell($tmpZip = "$env:TEMP\\render-cli.zip"; $tmpDir = "$env:TEMP\\render-cli-extract"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://github.com/render-oss/cli/releases/download/v2.17.0/cli_2.17.0_windows_amd64.zip" -OutFile $tmpZip; if \(Test-Path $tmpDir\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmpDir }; Expand-Archive -Path $tmpZip -DestinationPath $tmpDir; Get-ChildItem $tmpDir | Format-Table Name, Length)
